string.text: A variety of combat costume made and collected personally to Woland to order. The suit includes a normal body armor with a light helmet. Alas, the material of the costume and helmet is not protected from electricity, besides, they do not help from psi-resistance. However, there is even a built -in container for artifacts.

Light armour used by MilStalker units. Excellent mobility and low encumbrance, offering basic ballistic protection and minimal environmental sealing. Best suited for reconnaissance, quick assaults and urban operations.

Special operations suit combining balanced protection with enhanced stealth features and integrated communications gear. Moderate weight with improved resistance against fragments and light anomalies. Favoured by squad-level specialists.

Standard heavy combat suit for MilStalker frontline troops. Reinforced ballistic plates and layered padding provide high protection at the cost of mobility. Good for sustained engagements and hazardous zones.

Assault-grade heavy armour with additional frontal reinforcement and tactical load-bearing attachments. Designed for breaching and direct assaults; includes extra pouches and hardpoints for grenades and gear. Reduced stealth and agility.

Prototype powered exoskeleton developed for MilStalker heavy teams. Greatly enhances carrying capacity, strength and endurance while providing substantial protection. Fragile electronics and limited availability — expensive and rare.
